skills.name: CoinGecko
skills.description: Live cryptocurrency prices and market data from CoinGecko. Ask for the current price, 24h change, or market cap of any coin or token.

skills.name: Etherscan (Pro)
skills.description: On-chain data for Ethereum + 60 EVM chains via Etherscan API V2: balances, transactions, ERC-20 transfers & holdings, contract ABI/source, gas, ETH price, plus PRO analytics (historical balances, token info, daily stats).

skills.name: WordPress
skills.description: Create and manage content on a WordPress site via the REST API: draft/publish/update posts and pages, upload images and set featured images, manage categories & tags, and moderate comments. Authenticates with an Application Password.
